title: Bedrock Bone Meal
description: Recreates some Bedrock Bone Meal functionality for players and dispensers.
body:
# If you are playing with this datapack on a server, you will need to enable command blocks in the server.properties.

Recreates Bedrock bone meal functionality for players and dispensers. Use bone meal on sugar cane, and small flowers!

![](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/lrTKvLFZ/images/9e15bc046aed303320b4fea9c04f9aadd13c6c5f.gif)
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/lrTKvLFZ/images/7703ca26d914d3d14c097e6991fe885d4b2f4a04.png)
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/lrTKvLFZ/images/5bd324f61575f766f4501e89f6e7c6c62b76c738.png)

Dispensers can bone meal sugar cane too.

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/lrTKvLFZ/images/e4a2c2eda25a3e2159f2bf8119abf73050da5c60.png)
